title: Pollymod
description: A silly little joke mod, including nobody's favorite: Pollylop!
body:
## **Welcome To Pollymod!**
- This addition to the game adds "Pollylop", who is a weird... thing...
- There are several new dimensions to explore, and two new storylines added to the base game!
- There are several... _interesting_ mobs, such as: Pollylop, Bullylop, Scarylop, Senior Pollylop, Clownypop, and the Pollyghast (Whatever that is...)!
   <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3EcPtYuJDdM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
1. Credit to _Mjgoofy_ for creating the Scarylop model and texture
2. Credit to _L33R0Y2763_ for the _original_ idea for Clownypop
3. Credit to _Mcreator_, the platform used to make this mod. (I can't code for my life)
